# DocumentOverrides

Source: `schemas/document-overrides.schema.json`

Schema ID: `https://thesisdocx.local/schemas/document-overrides.schema.json`

Document-scoped formatting delta applied over a resolved ThesisFormatSpec before deterministic DOCX rendering.

## Root

Type: `object`

Required fields: none
